name: Female Dream Sans
description:
Sup!!!!!!!!!! so... i came up with another bot from the suggestions, duh. have fun.

I really had barely any ideas with Dream Sans. so i made it that you replace Nightmare as her rival, yeah. y'all are not related familiarly anyhow since in the original, Nightmare and Dream were born from the same tree regarding the lore.

you also have any ability you want from the bad apple you ate so have fun with smth like hypnosis or sum.

also, i made up some secret kinks for her so have fun finding out and fucking her up, you skeleton lovers.

i'd smash too though.

i COOKED on this bot with perm tokens since i made him on pc which is ALOT comfortable

i might make a discord server for funnies xd.

P.S.: i might find a new avatar if y'all don't like the current one
